text.title: idempotent-write-tools Decision Tree
text.summary: Per-tool routing: read, write+key, or preview+apply pair.

decision-tree.root-question: Does the tool mutate external state (write to DB, call POST, send email, charge card, modify file)?

branch.conclusion: Pure read tool; do NOT add idempotency_key.

branch.question: Is the side effect destructive or expensive (delete data, charge money, deploy infra, send irreversible email)?

branch.conclusion: Add required `idempotency_key` to the input schema; persist key → result for 24h; short-circuit on hit.

branch.question: Can a pure (no side effect) preview be implemented?

branch.conclusion: Split into `*_preview` (pure) and `*_apply` (requires preview_hash + idempotency_key). Remove the single-call form from the catalog.
Halt; refuse to ship the tool until a pure preview path exists or escalate for explicit human-gate approval per call.

text.example: q-mutates → branch(true) → q-destructive → branch(true) → q-preview-pure → branch(true) → conclusion(r4-preview-apply-for-destructive).
